name: Process Execution Error In JVM Based Application
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Moti Harmats
SIGMA Title: Process Execution Error In JVM Based Application
SIGMA Description: Detects process execution related exceptions in JVM based apps, often relates to RCE

False positives:
- Application bugs

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cannot run program%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%java.lang.processimpl%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%java.lang.processbuilder%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Process Execution Error In JVM Based Application on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cannot run program%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%java.lang.processimpl%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%java.lang.processbuilder%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Process Execution Error In JVM Based Application
